app.title: Show HN: Browser-based light pollution simulator using real photometric data
app.author: holg
proposed_tests: Install Skyglow demo and simulate light pollution in NYC
Insert 1000 points and measure render latency
Run a query with WHERE clause, measure query latency
Compare Skyglow latency vs Google Sky Map

test_results.benchmark_notes:

BENCHMARK:insert_points_ms:1939.91
BENCHMARK:query_latency_ms:2.64
BENCHMARK:vs_google_map_ms:484.11
BENCHMARK:vs_skyglow_ratio:0.25
BENCHMARK:memory_usage_mb:0.00
BENCHMARK:test_files_count:1
